title: 100Pcs Loom Bands S Clips, Colorful Rubber Band Connectors Refills Kit with Hooks, Suitable for Craft Making DIY Bracelet Woven Connector Necklace Jewelry Accessories
features: Material: This loom bands s clips is made of high-quality plastic, which is strong, elastic, not easy to break, reusable and very durable.

Packaging content: You will receive a set of loom band kits, which includes 100 loom bands s clips. The quantity is sufficient and the colors are rich, fully meeting the creative design needs of people of all ages.

Exquisite design: This s clips for loom bands features a classic S-shaped curve design with hooks, making it easy to hook anywhere. It has a colorful and bright appearance, which can effectively stimulate children's creativity and design ability.

Easy to use: This product is compact, with dimensions of 8.7*6.8*1CMCM. It is easy to install and disassemble, and the operation is simple. Even children can handle it with ease. It is an excellent accessory for DIY.

Versatile uses: It is not only a perfect diy accessory for making rubber band bracelets and knitted parts, but also can be widely used in various handicraft projects, such as hanging items and connecting materials, suitable for all age groups.
description: Product Specifications: Packaging: 100 pieces Size: 8.7*6.8*1CM Material: Plastic Use: This braided S clip is durable, easy to install and disassemble and can be reused. Colorful colors create children's imagination and designs for all ages and are the perfect DIY accessories for rubber band bracelets and knitted accessories, and can also be used in a variety of craft projects.
